title: GreedFall

notes:
The game has two mp4 files it wants to play as an intro. The game will open and immediately close, if you don't install the media foundation workaround for wine into the Wine prefix of the game (https://github.com/z0z0z/mf-install).
Simply deleting the files may also be an option, but a) I don't know if this actually works, b) there may be more than just those two mp4 files of the intro used in the entirety of the game and c) updates may put those mp4 files back where they were, so you would have to keep an eye on them. It's easier to just install the media foundation workaround.
After installing the workaround, the game ran with no issues at all. Character creation worked perfectly fine, and I played the intro sequence in the palace and 2 quests in the city. Dialogues work perfectly fine, there were no shadow problems or other graphical glitches, controls were smooth (I used a Steam controller).

I also used the Large Address Aware launch option, but I don't think it's actually needed. So no, I would not recommend using it. Obviously if you experience any other problems, it's definitely worth trying some of the launch options to see whether or not the problem can be fixed with one of them.
title: GreedFall

notes: As others have stated, the game will not launch unless the following tweak is used https://github.com/z0z0z/mf-install. In addition to this, on occassion when opening the menu, the framerate will tank to the point where the game is unplayable. Restarting the game remedies this.
title: GreedFall

notes:
Install https://github.com/z0z0z/mf-install in the wine prefix, located in STEAMDIR/steamapps/common/compatdata/606880/pfx

You need wine installed on your system independently of proton for this, set the WINEPREFIX environment variable to the proton prefix and run ./install-mf.sh

Works perfectly after that
title: GreedFall

Tienes algo menos de rendimiento que en Windows, pero sólo unos 10 fps y va muy estable. Seguro que con futuros parches mejorará.

title: GreedFall

notes:
To get the game to launch, you need media foundation support added.
This can be done by grabbing the zip or cloning the source from
Git.

https://github.com/z0z0z/mf-install

After doing that, open a terminal in that directory and execute the
mf-install.sh for your user

e.g. WINEPREFIX="/home/$USER/.local/share/Steam/steamapps/compatdata/751440/pfx" ./install-mf.sh
	
On my setup I had an appalling 12 - 15fps so I added on mesa-aco
and Valve's fsync, this boosted the framerate to about 57 - 60fps
in game.

There are fps spike to about 46fps from time to time.

Graphics set to High on 1080p.

On better graphic cards, you should likely be able to run on
Ultra with acceptable framerates.

Mesa-ACO pinned topic: https://steamcommunity.com/app/221410/discussions/0/1640915206474070669/
FSync pinned topic: https://steamcommunity.com/app/221410/discussions/0/3158631000006906163/
title: GreedFall
